summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CF Gutters contact form functionality. All contact form features are working perfectly - forms submit successfully, data is stored in MongoDB, emails are sent via Resend, and both homepage and contact-us page forms are fully functional.
passed_tests: POST /api/contact endpoint returns 200 with valid form data
Form data is stored in MongoDB contact_submissions collection successfully
Contact form on /contact-us page submits successfully and shows success message
Contact form on homepage (bottom section, scroll to #contact) submits successfully
Form validation works - shows errors for missing required fields (fullName, phone, email, appointmentDate, streetAddress)
Backend handles email failure gracefully - still returns success if Resend fails
Email integration working - emails sent successfully via Resend API (email_sent: true)
Form resets after successful submission indicating proper success handling
All form fields are interactive and functional (9/9 fields, 2/2 checkboxes, 2/2 radio buttons)
CORS configured properly for cross-origin requests
Contact information cards and navigation elements working on Contact Us page
Form handles different data types correctly (text, email, date, select, checkbox, radio, textarea)
Success messages display correctly to users
Backend validation returns proper 422 status for invalid data
Form submission works with various service types and property configurations
